content.text:
Scribe, the path is clear. Access the Memory Bank and your internal soul to document the breakthrough. 
Synthesize the Master Gnosis for Phase 3.0 in docs/MASTER_GNOSIS_PHASE_3.md. 
Include: 1. Headless Archon Mode, 2. Auth Hardening, 3. Vampire Control, 4. A2A Memory protocol, 5. The Sentinel monitoring, and 6. The Relay Protocol for Turn Limits.
Reference the existing documentation in docs/03-how-to-guides/ to ensure complete coverage.
